data.title: South Korea Cuts Economic Growth Forecast, Impeached President Defies Arrest As Political Turmoil Continues
data.description: More than 100 South Korean police officers failed to arrest impeached President Yoon Suk Yeol after a near-six-hour standoff on Friday, in the latest development in that country's month-long political crisis.

data.description: Investors brace for uncertainty as U.S. stock market logs five straight losing sessions, while bond yields and Tesla's performance raise concerns.
